065_[LOC_00863]062_052_056_[LOC_05449]058_052_055_056_[LOC_05449]051_[LOC_05449]046_[LOC_05449][LOC_05034]051_065_043_035_022_009_016_015_008_002_349_345_346_347_340_337_336_336_336_350_346_343_347_357_355_356_005_009_006_014_014_015_012_025_010_021_017_018_014_013_011_001_357_002_353_343_330_331_335_339_338_335_336_336_333_340_333_338_330_317_315_328_318_313_310_325_333_[LOC_05034]322_[LOC_05034]323_336_[LOC_05034]337_330_[LOC_05034]335_328_334_334_[LOC_05034]341_[LOC_05035]342_342_[LOC_05035][LOC_04780]334_329_349_344_343_340_341_347_341_334_328_339_341_337_335_335_342_334_335_323_323_318_304_302_290_293_296_292_284_285_296_314_[LOC_04780]313_[LOC_04780]311_[LOC_04780][LOC_04778]322_313_311_300_305_297_[LOC_04778]300_300_290_293_[LOC_04778]302_[LOC_04778][LOC_04471]309_308_302_314_320_321_312_316_313_314_298_305_308_300_295_293_300_302_312_316_325_329_317_321_335_334_335_336_350_350_352_001_350_350_340_335_329_322_315_316_330_321_319_330_334_337_356_338_335_324_330_337_345_352_006_351_351_355_349_356_003_000_017_014_010_023_037_043_038_045_050_048_038_056_058_067_073_075_076_073_061_067_071_076_092_094_102_108_107_107_101_102_109_109_108_105_113_125_117_109_106_095_104_089_084_086_080_082_080_071_070_066_061_067_076_078_076_084_078_088_078_083_058_061_062_056_036_024_017_010_017_016_022_023_005_354_005_017_014_024_021_011_014_028_032_039_032_033_045_[LOC_04471]054_052_[LOC_04471]052_056_[LOC_04471]069_066_[LOC_00449]061_[LOC_00449]067_061_[LOC_00449]048_041_[LOC_04472]028_[LOC_04470]021_020_025_020_[LOC_04470][LOC_04352]033_028_029_040_038_051_038_026_028_032_037_044_055_040_031_017_017_011_016_018_022_024_043_046_031_011_[LOC_04352]015_[LOC_04352][LOC_03725]016_004_358_010_003_005_004_005_009_008_006_358_357_355_354_347_340_340_337_354_351_357_356_002_355_341_350_348_353_338_345_350_351_342_340_335_322_330_323_316_301_309_309_313_307_314_330_331_326_332_327_338_346_338_336_342_346_345_339_342_344_350_359_001_002_006_011_008_001_356_356_359_343_344_343_330_328_334 01619]177_[LOC_01619]177_[LOC_01619][LOC_01770]170_166_155_151_155_146_155_176_174_174_171_166_173_175_176_180_174_179_185_183_180_174_169_169_157_147_134_118_115_117_127_115_104_098_090_088_092_104_104_099_095_098_103_106_120_128_126_121_118_114_119_126_122_120_120_113_119_120_113_109_117_124_126_140_149_136_140_136_134_118_131_134_138_127_125_125_115_113_106_109_113_106_102_102_101_092_088_079_084_087_085_087_100_098_106_100_098_100_100_098_092_083_095_094_088_076_072_073_076_076_082_072_072_067_068_073_075_078_083_081_088_094_090_097_091_101_111_118_120_122_125_123_131_128_132_137_140_133_136_147_152_153_152_152_161_156_156_158_166_175_[LOC_01770][LOC_01935]177_181_188_186_199_191_182_174_175_185_173_175_179_184_188_187_190_192_199_200_196_198_205_189_184_185_180_181_177_178_172_173_170_168_176_165_162_165_167_171_166_164_174_153_153_144_151_154_143_147_152_148_137_141_147_160_150_151_148_143_136_130_137_141_147_144_142_139_139_140_149_158_146_146_151_143_133_135_146_147_145_141_144_155_161_164_167_166_165_[LOC_01935]157_[LOC_01935]164_[LOC_01935]171_[LOC_01935]171_[LOC_01935]168_[LOC_01935]167_166_[LOC_01931]168_169_[LOC_01931]175_180_[LOC_00502]181_176_180_183_[LOC_01934]179_[LOC_01934]172_174_170_170_[LOC_01934][LOC_04330]158_152_160_165_164_162_152_153_155_154_151_147_145_144_139_127_127_126_129_127_123_118_116_115_115_115_113_117_123_123_124_126_119_109_119_120_109_113_113_105_109_111_108_104_104_106_112_118_129_128_144_142_148_152_148_146_146_145_142_141_138_136_130_127_120_112_121_118_108_103_109_115_119_120_118_125_119_120_121_123_126_126_125_129_124_134_139_145_142_134_133_143_146_142_146_153_153_138_124_128_131_128_137_150_141_137_135_123_126_132_127_125_127_121_121_111_107_106_115_119_122_129_129_123_130_126_133_138_138_144_136_137_140_141_145_144_132_123_122_118_120_107_103_096_082_089_090_089_084_083_087_092_092_094_091_089_083_084_088_090_096_090_098_107_109_102_112_105_093_084_091_094_095_092_081_085_078_084_087_090_095_081_086_092_101_116_112_111_
